chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-106 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.2490/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on CMA No.460/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026. Mr. Shafquat Ali Metlo, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The Petition appears to be misconceived inasmuch as the Petitioner has approached the private bank, where his account has been frozen. Even that being so, the direct invocation by the Petitioner of the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution appears to be misconceived, as a remedy is available to the Petitioner before the Banking Mohtasib. The Petition thus stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith pending Miscellaneous Applications, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail such remedy, if so desired. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
